get.description: Sensor series and actuator states for one greenhouse over the trailing `window` — the historical seed the SPA caches and merges with the live WebSocket edge (frontend data model §4, §6, key ["telemetry", id, range]). The window is resolved server-side against the greenhouse's latest stored (simulated) timestamp; the response `from`/`to` report the resolved span. An unknown window is rejected with 422.
